questions.text: You are preparing data for a monthly management meeting. Require that users enter the password '1235' before they can add, delete, move, rename, or hide worksheets in the current workbook

On the 'Suppliers' worksheet, in the 'Supplier ID' column, apply a custom number format to automatically display eache ID with '#' symbol followed by five digits. The existing number should be padded with zeroes to create the five digits. For example, '123' will be desplayed as '#00123'

On the 'Orders' worksheet, in the 'Order Total' column, create a conditional formatting rule that uses the Icon Sets format style to display a Pink Circle when the value is greater than or equal to '1000', a Yellow Cicle when the value is less than 1000 and greater than or equal to '200', and a Grey Cicle when the value is less than 200
On the 'Orders' worksheet, in cell J5, enter a formula to return the single largest 'Order Total' based on the 'Supplier' and the 'Material' displayed in cells J3 and J4
On the 'Purchase Summary' worksheet, configure the PivoTable to display a blank line below the last 'Supplier' in each 'Material' section
